## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and programmatic approach for Vapi's SEO and marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focusing on 3-4 key content clusters: model comparisons, STT/TTS guides, and integration recipes](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Aiming to publish 2+ articles next week, ramping up to regular weekly cadence](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Developing programmatic templates for voice agents and chatbots, inspired by successful examples](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Balancing high-intent technical content with broader, higher-volume topics to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Clusters

  - [Identified 10 potential content clusters, prioritizing 3-4 to start:](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Model comparisons (TTS, STT, LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [STT and TTS guides (e.g., diarization, vocoders)](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Voice-related apps and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Integration recipes (e.g., Twilio + 11labs + DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Aim to develop 30-40 assignments per cluster for 3-4 months of content](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Balancing technical, high-intent content with broader, higher-volume topics](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Programmatic Approach

  - [Creating templates for voice agents and chatbots, similar to Fathom's integration web](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Covering both organic search intent and enabling current users](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Including benefits, options, and product integration paths on template pages](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Considering adding sample conversations or "hit play" demos for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Content Development and Publishing

  - [Calibrating content approach for each cluster due to differing formats](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Aiming to publish 1-2 articles per week initially, across chosen clusters](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Developing assignments further, e.g., comprehensive lists of open-source TTS/STT models](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Exploring ways to include model samples or quick demos in articles](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Engaging designer and web developer for programmatic template prototyping](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Considering Airtable + Supabase for content management as volume scales](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Using existing static CMS (likely Gatsby) for initial implementation](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Send calibration feedback and develop 30-40 assignments per chosen cluster](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Publish first 1-2 articles next week, aiming for regular weekly cadence thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Create sample programmatic template for review early next week](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [GrowthX to access Vapi's CMS and begin template implementation](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Explore inclusion of model samples or demos in content](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Continue developing ghostwriting for founders as a parallel workstream](https://fathom.video/share/92tyUwhU5ak22tuvd9tmKSUMKW_cPmss?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
